statusExplanations.pass: Formula evaluation indicates the scenario is currently within the acceptable decision range.
statusExplanations.review: Formula evaluation is favorable but still requires review before execution.
statusExplanations.conditional: Formula evaluation supports conditional execution with explicit constraint checks.
statusExplanations.monitor: Formula evaluation requires ongoing monitoring because risk or readiness margin is limited.
statusExplanations.defer: Formula evaluation indicates commitment should be deferred until funding or constraint gaps improve.
statusExplanations.at-risk: Formula evaluation indicates material risk that requires mitigation before execution.
statusExplanations.reject: Formula evaluation does not support execution under the current assumptions.
